en: Cause I'll be happy, Christmas, once again
I took a shower washing every body part with actual soap
ko: 나는 샤워를 하면서 모든 신체 부위를 비누로 씻었어

en: including all the major crevices, including in between my toes and in my belly button
ko: 주요 틈새를 포함해서 발가락 사이와 배꼽도 씻었어

en: which I never did before but sort of enjoyed
ko: 전에 해본 적은 없지만 꽤 즐거웠어

en: I washed my hair with the Don't Formula shampoo and used cream rinse for that just washed shine
ko: 나는 Don't Formula 샴푸로 머리를 감고, 방금 씻은 광택을 위해 크림 린스를 사용했어

en: I can't seem to find my toothbrush, so I'll pick one up when I go out today
ko: 내 칫솔을 찾을 수가 없어서 오늘 외출할 때 하나 사올 거야

en: Other than that I'm in good shape
